title: Incoming Tide Advisory
content: Incoming tide expected after 6PM near marsh inlets. Reduced visibility and drifting debris reported along still-water banks.

title: Low-Light Fishing Conditions
content: Dense fog expected across shallow water zones after sunset. Lantern-pattern lures recommended for evening casting.

title: Cold Water Report
content: Fish activity reduced during early morning hours. Slow retrieval techniques recommended in colder channels.

title: Marsh Water Notice
content: Recent rainfall may increase debris movement near low shoreline areas. Exercise caution when navigating narrow inlets.
